document.name: Rainbow Castle Indoor Playground — Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Flushing indoor playground birthday packages with private party rooms, open play access, obstacle courses, slides, and tiered Gold/Platinum/Diamond packages.
document.longDescription:
Rainbow Castle Indoor Playground is an indoor family play venue in Flushing, Queens, at 131-48 Avery Avenue. The official site describes birthday parties with wall-to-wall jumps, slides, obstacle courses, and arcade games, plus free setup and cleanup and a private party room.

The official OUR PARTIES page lists three tiers. Gold packages start at $598 plus tax for 10–15 kids and 20 adults (or $698 plus tax for 15–20 kids and 25 adults) and include a private room with open playground access, a birthday banner, music, and cleaning service; families may arrive 30 minutes early with their own decorations and tableware. Platinum and Diamond packages add themed décor, balloons, juice, pinata, pizza, and other items at higher published rates ($758–$1,188 plus tax depending on tier and headcount). Parties are two hours; the page notes a $200 non-refundable deposit to reserve, socks required for all guests, and additional per-child and per-adult fees beyond package limits.

General admission pricing on the PRICES page lists ages 10 months–15 years. Published hours on the site are Monday–Thursday 10:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m., Friday–Saturday 10:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m., and Sunday 10:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m. Phone listed on the site: 347-506-9900.

This listing image is an official photograph published on rainbowcastleplayground.com (venue gallery), re-hosted on ImgBB for ClassScout storage policy compliance.

Sources: https://www.rainbowcastleplayground.com/ https://www.rainbowcastleplayground.com/index.php/Home/Index/cms/mid/19 https://www.rainbowcastleplayground.com/index.php/Home/Index/cms/mid/18
document.announcementDescription: Official parties page lists Gold, Platinum, and Diamond tiers with two-hour parties and a $200 deposit to reserve—confirm current pricing and availability by phone.
